title: Cleaning Transaction Data in SQL
description: Raw financial data is often messy, inconsistent, or incomplete. In this project, I cleaned a year's worth of consumer transaction data.

title: MRR & Retention Analysis
description: Tracking SaaS revenue metrics is key for stakeholders. In this project I use SQL, Python, and Tableau to analyse and visualise MRR & retention.

title: Exploratory Analysis of Real Estate Data
description: In this project I clean, transform and visualise decades of Connecticut real estate data.

title: Data Warehouse Project
description: This project implements a modern data warehouse using the Medallion Architecture and realistic ERP data.
